fields.title: New Year Party
fields.description:
✨🎉 New Year Party Bash 2026! 🎉✨

Get ready to say goodbye to the past and welcome the future in style! Join us for an unforgettable New Year’s Eve celebration filled with music, laughter, and electrifying vibes. Dance the night away with live DJs, enjoy delicious food and drinks, and count down to midnight with a spectacular celebration you won’t forget.

Whether you’re coming with friends or making new ones, this is the perfect place to create memories, share joy, and start the year on a high note. Let’s celebrate new beginnings together! 🥂✨

Don’t miss the party of the year!
fields.full_address: LJ Campus, LJ University Rd, off Sarkhej - Gandhinagar Highway, Makarba, Ahmedabad,

fields.title: Diwali Pooja
fields.description:
🪔✨ **Diwali Pooja Invitation** ✨🪔

With great joy and festive spirit, we invite you and your family to join us for the auspicious **Diwali Pooja** on this sacred occasion of the Festival of Lights. Let us come together to seek the blessings of Goddess Lakshmi and Lord Ganesha for prosperity, happiness, and success.

The evening will be filled with traditional rituals, devotional prayers, and the warm glow of diyas, followed by prasad and festive celebrations. Your presence will make this occasion even more special and memorable for us.

📅 Date: 7th April , 2026
🕖 Time: 8 AM
📍 Venue: Surat

We look forward to celebrating this beautiful festival with you and your loved ones.

🌟 **Let’s light up our hearts and homes together!** 🌟
fields.full_address: Muglisara, Surat, Opposite LIC Building, Gordhandas Chokhavada Marg, Surat
